seoDescription: Learn who is behind Cx Assistant — an AI-powered commissioning platform built by engineers, for engineers.
title: About Us
subtitle: We're engineers who got tired of managing commissioning projects with spreadsheets.

mission.label: Our mission
mission.text: Cx Assistant exists to give commissioning teams their time back. We built the platform we wished we had — one that captures issues, tracks progress, and answers questions instantly, so teams can focus on actual engineering instead of status updates.

story.label: How it started
story.text: After years of working on complex industrial commissioning projects, we experienced first-hand how much time is lost hunting for information, chasing updates, and maintaining trackers. We started building Cx Assistant to change that — combining structured project data with AI so every answer is a message away.

items.title: Built for the field
items.description: Every feature is designed around how commissioning teams actually work — fast-moving, high-stakes, and detail-heavy.

items.title: Clarity over complexity
items.description: We strip away noise. Our platform is simple enough that new team members are productive on day one.

items.title: Data you can trust
items.description: Cx Assistant gives you real-time visibility into project status, backed by the data your team enters every day.

cta.title: Ready to see it in action?
cta.subtitle: Start your free trial or get in touch — we'd love to show you around.
